summary: One in-person retreat/year at luxury, secluded, high-security properties (5-star resorts, private islands, gated estates). Bi-continental: US axis (CA/AZ/UT) + Europe axis (Venice/Ireland), plus a Turkey Bitcoin-themed event. All venues to date RENTED, not owned — reporting calls Dialog 'nomadic,' which the planned Virginia campus is meant to end. Three US resorts + the Venice palace are well documented (multiple outlets + leaked $16,846 Gelman invitation). Powerscourt (Ireland) booked for Aug 12-16 2026 then CANCELLED July 2026 after the leak + Palestine-solidarity campaign. The DC-area campus is documented as reported INTENT from a single Axios tipster (Aug 2025); location precision, cost, acreage, buyer entity, and the Langley/CIA-proximity significance remain claimed/analytical, unconfirmed.

locations.location: Ritz-Carlton Dove Mountain, Marana/Tucson area, Arizona
San Clemente Palace (private island), Venice, Italy
Powerscourt Hotel, Powerscourt Estate, Enniskerry, Co. Wicklow, Ireland
locations.grade: documented (Irish Times, RTE, Irish Examiner + estate statement)

locations.location: Northern Virginia suburbs (Fairfax/Loudoun speculated), near Washington DC
locations.status: reported in negotiation; specifics/status unconfirmed as of 2026
